featured.headline: Who's Spending in Your Congressional Election? We Tracked the Front Groups Fueling the 2026 Midterms.
featured.dek: Investigation reveals how both parties use shadowy front groups to funnel anonymous corporate cash into elections while publicly claiming to support transparency.
